name: webplayer
description: Browser video player for MKV with HDR / Dolby Vision and soft subtitles. Zero transcoding: Matroska is repackaged into fragmented MP4 and handed to Media Source Extensions.

scripts.test: node tools/test-demux.mjs && node tools/test-boxes.mjs && node tools/test-remux.mjs && node tools/test-pgs.mjs && node tools/test-srt.mjs
